## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` passes, and `make fmt` has been applied
- [ ] Python / shell parse where touched (`py_compile` / `bash -n`)
- [ ] No secrets, account IDs, ARNs, kubeconfigs, or real data added
- [ ] Docs / ADRs updated if behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] dev and scale stay in lockstep (shared module, values-only difference)
